name: Bob Mann
abstract: Bob Mann (born 1944 in New York City, United States) is an American guitarist and arranger.

concerts.label: Newport Jazz Festival: Donny Hathaway/ Herbie Mann Quintet and The Family of Mann
Standard Time with Michael Feinstein: Michael Feinstein and Friends

about_quotes.speaker: Fred Lipsius
about_quotes.evidence: And I remember Bob Mann, who’s dad used to be the piano player or something on the Arthur Godfrey Show, Bob Mann played with everybody. Well Taylor, James Taylor. He was with him for years. Perfect pitch. And he asked me one day... he said, “Who did that arrangement of ‘Lonesome Suzie?’” I said, “I
